name: Sesame Noodles #1
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spaghetti according to package instructions and drain.
2. Rinse the cooked spaghetti with cold water (adjust quantity as desired).
3. In a bowl or food processor, mix 4 tablespoons of peanut butter with 3 teaspoons of warm water until creamy and light in color.
4. Add 2 teaspoons of sesame oil, 1 dash of soy sauce, 1/2 teaspoon of sugar, and 1 dash of Tabasco to the peanut butter mixture. Adjust seasoning to taste.
5. Pour the dressing over the cooked spaghetti noodles and toss gently to coat.
